title: Truist announces fourth-quarter 2022 earnings call details
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Dec. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) will report fourth-quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, Jan. 19, 2023.

title: Truist increases prime rate to 7.50%
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Dec. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) announced an increase in its prime lending rate to 7.50% from 7.00%, effective tomorrow, Dec. 15, 2022.

title: Down 30% This Year, Is Truist a Buy Before 2023?
text: Truist is the byproduct of the larger merger between SunTrust and BB&T.

title: Access to Capital for Entrepreneurs receives $3.75 million grant from Truist Foundation to support expansion into South Georgia
text: Largest grant in organization's history will be used to provide inclusive, affordable and flexible capital for minority-owned small businesses in rural, underserved Georgia communities ATLANTA , Dec. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Foundation today announced a $3.75 million commitment to launch the Diverse, Equitable and Inclusive Small Business Capital strategy at Access to Capital for Entrepreneurs Inc. (ACE), a nonprofit and community development financial institution, that provides capital, coaching and connections to help borrowers create and grow sustainable businesses that generate jobs. This grant serves as the largest philanthropic corporate gift in ACE's history.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For December 2022
text: I present my top 10 High Yield dividend stocks that are poised to offer strong future returns. The annualized rate of return for this watchlist is 16.68% over the past 25 months.

title: Truist and Truist Foundation announce $4.5 million in grants to strengthen Texas' racially diverse small business ecosystem
text: HOUSTON , Dec. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Foundation today announced a $3.5 million grant to PeopleFund, a Texas-based Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI) and nonprofit 501(c)(3) that strives to create economic opportunity and financial stability for underserved people by providing access to capital, education and other resources to build healthy small businesses. Truist Foundation's grant provides long-term sustainability for PeopleFund's Black, Indigenous, Person of Color (BIPOC) Small Business Accelerator, a program that provides business owners the capital, resources and network to start and grow their businesses and attain economic mobility.
